tasks.subject: standardize-agent-creation-flow [P1] Fix SidebarTabRow edit button — replace setAgentDialogOpen with creation store
tasks.description:
## Goal

Fix `SidebarTabRow.tsx` so the pencil/edit button at the right end of the tab row opens the unified creation dialog instead of the agent editing dialog.

## Important Context

The spec says the SidebarTabRow + button should open the creation dialog. Looking at the current code, the button is labeled "Edit Agent" with a Pencil icon and calls `setAgentDialogOpen(true)` from `useAppStore`. This is the bug: it opens the editing dialog instead of the creation dialog.

Per the spec, the fix is to wire it to `useAgentCreationStore.getState().open()`. Note: the spec says "SidebarTabRow.tsx + button" referring to this as an add/create entry point — the button label, icon, and tooltip should also be updated from "Edit Agent" (Pencil) to something appropriate for creation. Based on the spec's intent of making every "add agent" action open the unified dialog, update the icon to `Plus` and the label/tooltip to "New Agent".

## Current Code

File: `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SidebarTabRow.tsx`

Relevant lines:

```tsx
import { MessageSquare, Clock, Plug2, LayoutGrid, Pencil } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAppStore } from '@/layers/shared/model';
// ...
const setAgentDialogOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setAgentDialogOpen);
// ...
<button
  type="button"
  onClick={() => setAgentDialogOpen(true)}
  className="text-muted-foreground/50 hover:text-muted-foreground rounded-md p-2 transition-colors duration-150"
  aria-label="Edit Agent"
>
  <Pencil className="size-(--size-icon-sm)" />
</button>
```

## Required Changes

1. **Remove** `useAppStore` import.
2. **Remove** `Pencil` from lucide-react import, **add** `Plus`.
3. **Add** import: `import { useAgentCreationStore } from '@/layers/shared/model';`
4. **Remove** `const setAgentDialogOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setAgentDialogOpen);` line.
5. **Replace** the button onClick: `onClick={() => useAgentCreationStore.getState().open()}`
6. **Update** the `aria-label` from `"Edit Agent"` to `"New Agent"`.
7. **Replace** `<Pencil>` icon with `<Plus>`.
8. **Update** tooltip text from `"Edit Agent"` to `"New Agent"`.

## Target Button Code

```tsx
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
    <button
      type="button"
      onClick={() => useAgentCreationStore.getState().open()}
      className="text-muted-foreground/50 hover:text-muted-foreground rounded-md p-2 transition-colors duration-150"
      aria-label="New Agent"
    >
      <Plus className="size-(--size-icon-sm)" />
    </button>
  </TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent side="bottom">New Agent</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>
```

## Target Imports

```tsx
import { MessageSquare, Clock, Plug2, LayoutGrid, Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn, isMac } from '@/layers/shared/lib';
import { useAgentCreationStore } from '@/layers/shared/model';
import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from '@/layers/shared/ui';
```

Note: `useAppStore` is fully removed from this file's imports.

## Acceptance Criteria

- The rightmost button in the SidebarTabRow calls `useAgentCreationStore.getState().open()` when clicked
- Button has `aria-label="New Agent"` and tooltip text "New Agent"
- Button uses `Plus` icon instead of `Pencil`
- No references to `useAppStore` or `setAgentDialogOpen` remain in this file
- Existing tab row behavior (tab switching, badges, keyboard nav) is unaffected
tasks.activeForm: Fixing SidebarTabRow edit button to open creation dialog

tasks.subject: standardize-agent-creation-flow [P1] Update agent-creation barrel exports — remove useTemplateCatalog
standardize-agent-creation-flow [P2] Rewrite CreateAgentDialog with three-tab layout
tasks.description:
## Goal Rewrite `CreateAgentDialog.tsx` to use a three-tab layout ("New Agent", "From Template", "Import") using the Shadcn Tabs component. Remove personality sliders and template collapsible from the top-level form. Embed `DiscoveryView` in the Import tab. Conditionally show/hide the footer Create button based on active tab. ## Current Code Summary File: `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-creation/ui/CreateAgentDialog.tsx` (219 lines) The current dialog has: - Name input with validation - Directory input with auto-generated path preview - Collapsible "Template" section with TemplatePicker - Collapsible "Personality" section with TraitSliders - Create/Cancel footer buttons - Controlled by `useAgentCreationStore` (isOpen, close) ## Architecture of the Rewrite The dialog becomes a `Tabs` container with three `TabsContent` panels: ``` Dialog DialogHeader (title + description) Tabs (controlled via activeTab state, defaultValue from store.initialTab) TabsList TabsTrigger "New Agent" value="new" TabsTrigger "From Template" value="template" TabsTrigger "Import" value="import" TabsContent value="new" Name input + Directory input (same as current) TabsContent value="template" TemplatePicker Name input + Directory input (duplicated fields for template tab) TabsContent value="import" DialogFooter (conditional — hidden when Import tab is active) Cancel + Create buttons ``` ## Detailed Implementation Steps ### 1. Update Imports Remove: - `ChevronDown` from lucide-react - `DEFAULT_TRAITS` from `@dorkos/shared/trait-renderer` - `type Traits` from `@dorkos/shared/mesh-schemas` - `playSliderTick` from `@/layers/shared/lib` - `Collapsible`, `CollapsibleTrigger`, `CollapsibleContent` from shared/ui - `TraitSliders` from `@/layers/entities/agent` Add: - `Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent` from `@/layers/shared/ui` - `DiscoveryView` from `@/layers/features/mesh` - `type CreationTab` from `@/layers/shared/model` (or from the store file) ### 2. Update Store Selector Change from: ```tsx const { isOpen, close } = useAgentCreationStore(); ``` To: ```tsx const { isOpen, initialTab, close } = useAgentCreationStore(); ``` ### 3. Add Active Tab State Track the currently active tab so the footer can be conditionally shown: ```tsx const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(initialTab); // Sync activeTab when dialog opens with a specific tab useEffect(() => { if (isOpen) setActiveTab(initialTab); }, [isOpen, initialTab]); ``` ### 4. Remove State Variables Remove these `useState` hooks: - `template` and `setTemplate` (moves into Tab 2 only) - `templateOpen` and `setTemplateOpen` - `traits` and `setTraits` - `personalityOpen` and `setPersonalityOpen` Keep these in Tab 1 scope: - `name` and `setName` - `directoryOverride` and `setDirectoryOverride` Add for Tab 2 (template tab) scope: - `templateName` / `setTemplateName` for the name field inside Tab 2 - `templateDirOverride` / `setTemplateDirOverride` for the directory field inside Tab 2 - `template` / `setTemplate` for the selected template Alternatively, share name/directory state across tabs (simpler). The spec says Tab 2 has its own name + directory fields with auto-fill from template name. Sharing state and resetting when switching tabs is acceptable. Choose the simpler approach: share `name`, `directoryOverride` across tabs (since only one tab submits at a time). Add `template` state only visible/relevant in Tab 2. ### 5. Update handleCreate The `handleCreate` callback should submit based on the active tab: - Tab 1 (new): `createAgent.mutate({ name, ...(directoryOverride ? { directory: directoryOverride } : {}) })` - Tab 2 (template): `createAgent.mutate({ name, ...(directoryOverride ? { directory: directoryOverride } : {}), ...(template ? { template } : {}) })` - Tab 3 (import): No submit button shown — DiscoveryView handles its own actions Note: The existing `traits` parameter is removed from the mutation call. No personality data is sent. ### 6. Update resetForm Remove `traits` and personality-related resets. Add `template` reset: ```tsx function resetForm() { setName(''); setDirectoryOverride(''); setTemplate(null); } ``` ### 7. Dialog Content Structure ```tsx Create Agent Set up a new agent or import an existing project. setActiveTab(v as CreationTab)}> New Agent From Template Import
{/* Name input — same markup as current */}
setName(e.target.value)} aria-invalid={showNameError} aria-describedby={showNameError ? 'agent-name-error' : undefined} /> {showNameError && (

{nameValidation.error}

)}
{/* Directory input — same markup as current */}

{name ? resolvedDirectory : `${defaultDirectory}/...`}

setDirectoryOverride(e.target.value)} />
{/* Name input for template tab */}
setName(e.target.value)} aria-invalid={showNameError} aria-describedby={showNameError ? 'template-agent-name-error' : undefined} /> {showNameError && (

{nameValidation.error}

)}
{/* Directory input for template tab */}

{name ? resolvedDirectory : `${defaultDirectory}/...`}

setDirectoryOverride(e.target.value)} />
{activeTab !== 'import' && ( )} ``` ### 8. Dialog Sizing Change `sm:max-w-md` to `sm:max-w-lg` on the `DialogContent` to accommodate the template grid and discovery results. ### 9. Auto-focus Behavior Keep the `useEffect` that focuses the name input on open, but only when on the 'new' or 'template' tab (not 'import'): ```tsx useEffect(() => { if (isOpen && activeTab !== 'import') nameInputRef.current?.focus(); }, [isOpen, activeTab]); ``` ### 10. Button Text Change the Create button text from `'Create'` to `'Create Agent'` to match the spec's dialog mockup. ## Acceptance Criteria - Dialog opens with three visible tabs: "New Agent", "From Template", "Import" - Default tab is "New Agent" when opened with `open()` or `open('new')` - Dialog opens on "Import" tab when opened with `open('import')` - Dialog opens on "From Template" tab when opened with `open('template')` - "New Agent" tab shows name input (auto-focused) and directory input - "From Template" tab shows TemplatePicker, name input, and directory input - "Import" tab shows DiscoveryView component - Footer "Create Agent" button is visible on New Agent and From Template tabs - Footer "Create Agent" button is hidden on Import tab - Cancel button always visible in footer (when footer is shown) - No personality sliders anywhere in the dialog - No collapsible template section (TemplatePicker is directly in Tab 2) - Dialog sizing is `sm:max-w-lg` - Name validation still works (inline error, disabled button) - Successful creation closes dialog, plays celebration, invalidates queries - Failed creation shows error toast - Form state resets when dialog closes - Description text updated to "Set up a new agent or import an existing project."

tasks.subject: standardize-agent-creation-flow [P3] Delete use-template-catalog.ts and its test file
tasks.description:
## Goal

Delete the built-in template catalog hook file and its corresponding test file, since built-in templates are replaced by marketplace-only templates.

## Files to Delete

1. `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-creation/model/use-template-catalog.ts`
2. `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-creation/__tests__/use-template-catalog.test.tsx`

## Pre-deletion Verification

Before deleting, verify no remaining imports:
- The barrel export was already removed in task 1.4
- `TemplatePicker.tsx` will have its `useTemplateCatalog` import removed in task 2.2
- Grep the codebase for `use-template-catalog` and `useTemplateCatalog` to confirm no other consumers

The test file `use-template-catalog.test.tsx` imports from `../model/use-template-catalog` directly and tests the hook in isolation. It has 4 tests (returns template list, loading state, error handling, stale time). All become irrelevant once the hook is deleted.

## Current File Contents (for reference)

`use-template-catalog.ts` (19 lines):
```ts
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { useTransport } from '@/layers/shared/model';

export function useTemplateCatalog() {
  const transport = useTransport();
  return useQuery({
    queryKey: ['templates'],
    queryFn: () => transport.getTemplates(),
    staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,
    gcTime: 30 * 60 * 1000,
  });
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- `use-template-catalog.ts` file is deleted from disk
- `use-template-catalog.test.tsx` file is deleted from disk
- No remaining imports of `useTemplateCatalog` anywhere in the codebase
- TypeScript compiles without errors
- Test suite passes (no broken imports)
tasks.activeForm: Deleting use-template-catalog.ts and its test file

tasks.subject: standardize-agent-creation-flow [P3] Clean up unused imports across all modified files
tasks.description:
## Goal

Sweep all files modified in Phases 1-2 for unused imports, dead code, and stale references. This is a cleanup pass to catch anything the individual tasks might have missed.

## Files to Audit

1. `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/agent-creation-store.ts` — verify no stale types
2. `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/index.ts` — verify `CreationTab` export added correctly
3. `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-creation/ui/CreateAgentDialog.tsx` — verify all removed imports are gone:
   - No `ChevronDown`
   - No `DEFAULT_TRAITS`, `Traits`
   - No `playSliderTick`
   - No `Collapsible*` (unless used elsewhere)
   - No `TraitSliders`
   - Has `Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent`
   - Has `DiscoveryView`
4. `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-creation/ui/TemplatePicker.tsx` — verify:
   - No `TemplateCategory` type import
   - No `useTemplateCatalog` import
   - No `Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent` imports (removed inner tabs)
   - Has `Collapsible*` imports
   - Has `ChevronDown` import
5. `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-creation/index.ts` — verify no `useTemplateCatalog` export
6. `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-sidebar/ui/AddAgentMenu.tsx` — verify no `useAppStore` import
7. `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SidebarTabRow.tsx` — verify no `useAppStore`, no `Pencil` import
8. `apps/client/src/layers/features/top-nav/ui/AgentsHeader.tsx` — verify no `ScanSearch`, no `ResponsiveDialog*`, no `DiscoveryView`, no `useState`

## Steps

1. Run TypeScript compiler check: `pnpm tsc --noEmit` from the client app
2. Run ESLint unused imports rule: `pnpm lint` from the client app
3. Fix any flagged unused imports or variables
4. Verify no circular dependency introduced by the new `DiscoveryView` import in `CreateAgentDialog` (features importing from sibling features is allowed for UI composition per FSD rules in `.claude/rules/fsd-layers.md`)

## Acceptance Criteria

- `pnpm tsc --noEmit` passes for the client app
- `pnpm lint` shows no new warnings/errors in modified files
- No unused import statements in any modified file
- No references to deleted code (`useTemplateCatalog`, `TraitSliders` in CreateAgentDialog, `setAgentDialogOpen` in AddAgentMenu/SidebarTabRow, `DiscoveryView` in AgentsHeader)
tasks.activeForm: Cleaning up unused imports across modified files
